subtasks.description: Query sam_licenses to retrieve current Adobe contracted state including product lines, contract terms, license counts, and renewal dates
Query consumption_facts to retrieve Q4 2024 actual spend and 90-day usage trends by Adobe product line

Reconcile sam_licenses contracted state with consumption_facts spend and usage data. Classify each product line by posture (expand, hold, reduce) based on utilization, spend trends, and renewal windows. Generate trajectory and recommendation summary

plan.cost_rationale: Two independent SQL queries (small tier) retrieve current contracted state and spend/usage facts in parallel. The cross_recon subtask (frontier tier) performs multi-signal reconciliation: it must align contract terms with actual consumption patterns, detect utilization gaps or over-spend, evaluate 90-day trend direction, and synthesize posture decisions (expand/hold/reduce) with business rationale. Frontier tier is justified because reconciliation requires inference across temporal trends, product-line-level segmentation, and recommendation generation. No additional policy_action is needed—the query asks for trajectory and prioritization, not compliance or governance review. Total: 3 subtasks is minimal and necessary.

output.sql: SELECT c.vendor_name, c.product_line, c.license_count, c.contract_start_date, c.contract_end_date, c.renewal_date, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date <= '2024-12-31' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) as q4_2024_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-09-02' AND cf.event_date <= '2024-12-01' THEN cf.daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END) as usage_90day_seats FROM (SELECT vendor_name, product_line, license_count, contract_start_date, contract_end_date, renewal_date FROM sam_licenses WHERE vendor_name = 'Adobe') c LEFT JOIN consumption_facts cf ON c.product_line = cf.product AND cf.event_date >= '2024-09-02' GROUP BY c.vendor_name, c.product_line, c.license_count, c.contract_start_date, c.contract_end_date, c.renewal_date ORDER BY q4_2024_spend DESC

SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) as q4_2024_spend, AVG(daily_active_seats) as avg_active_seats, COUNT(DISTINCT event_date) as usage_days, SUM(daily_active_seats) as total_seat_days FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher = 'Adobe' AND event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date <= '2024-12-31' AND fiscal_quarter = 4 AND fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY product ORDER BY q4_2024_spend DESC
